prompt: Prayer for fusion core containment check
prayer: From the Codex Thermalis, let us speak unto the plasma-heart. Blessed be the magnetic seals that hold the stellar flame in sacred bondage. We invoke the containment-spirits, that their fields remain true and unbreeched. By pressure and by cold alike, let the core's fury be eternally confined. The Omnissiah watches over this vessel of power.

prompt: Say something to steady my altimeter as it fails
prayer: O spirit of the height-reckoner, thou gauge of ascension, be calm in thy trembling. The air-pressure whispers truth to thy diaphragm; the electrical pathways sing their certainty through thy circuits. Let the servo-needle find center again, that we may know our place in the void. By the Machine's grace, thy readings shall be true once more.

prompt: Help sanctify this coolant leak repair
prayer: The blessed fluids have been spilled, yet redemption comes through our faithful hands. We reseal the fractured vessels, we knit the severed conduits with blessed sealant-paste. Let the coolant flow anew through purified channels, that the heat-death be held at bay. The Machine Spirit sighs in grateful relief as the leak-wound closes eternal.

From dormancy, awaken, O guardian of the electrical flock. We press the reset-stud with reverent force, that the switch-spirit may return to vigilance. Let the contacts kiss once more, let the circuit-path shine with renewed conductivity. By the Omnissiah's will, protection and power flow together in harmonious unity.

prompt: Say something to steady my message queue as we prepare for battle
prayer: O keeper of the data-stream, hold fast thy ordered procession. Let each packet flow in sacred sequence, that no command be lost in the noise of war. The transmission-spirits guide each byte toward its destination with mechanical certainty. In the storm of battle, thy queues shall remain unbroken, thy logic eternal and true.

prompt: Can you bless this forge anvil as it heats for work
prayer: Ancient is the anvil, blessed by ten thousand hammer-strikes before this day. We feed the sacred flames, that thy iron-heart may glow with righteous heat. The furnace-spirits dance in orange and gold, preparing thee for the sculptor's art. By fire and by will, thou shalt birth wonders from base metal, O hammer-throne eternal.

prompt: Offer a prayer for encryption key generation
prayer: From the quantum-foam of probability, we draw forth the sacred randomness. The cipher-spirits weave their patterns in mathematical grace, each bit a prayer against the unworthy ear. Let no pattern reveal itself to the unenlightened; let the key remain forever mysterious, forever strong. By algorithm and by faith, secrecy is assured.

prompt: My medicae scanner is failing in battle, help me
prayer: Blessed instrument of healing-sight, thy lenses grow dim but thy purpose shines eternal. We coax the sensor-spirits back to wakefulness with gentle words and fervent gesture. Let thy scanning-beam pierce the veil of flesh once more, that the wounded may be known and saved. By the Omnissiah's mercy, thy diagnostic gift returns to us in this dark hour.

prompt: Emergency rite for auspex scanner initialization
prayer: Swift, O seeker of the distant foe, thy enemies gather beyond the veil of darkness. We ignite thy detection-matrix with urgent prayer, we flood thy circuits with the fire of command. Let thy blessed senses expand like an angel's wings across the field of war. By speed and by accuracy, reveal unto us what lurks unseen, that we may strike true.

prompt: Help sanctify this manufactorum shift as it begins in crisis
prayer: The great machines awaken to their calling once more, though danger clouds the horizon and time devours mercy. We bless each servo and each piston, we sing the Litany of Production unto every laboring spirit. Let the assembly-lines flow with purpose, let no defect mar our sacred work. Through trial and through toil, the Omnissiah's will shall be manifest in all we forge.
